LanguageData.VFET_Encouraging.stages.0.description: Hey, some of those ideas were pretty great! I think we are unto something here.
LanguageData.VFET_Encouraging.stages.0.label: encouraging tribal gathering
LanguageData.VFET_Ineffective.stages.0.description: We tried to discuss some new developments in the tribe, but it devolved into petty bickering about food and shelter...
LanguageData.VFET_Ineffective.stages.0.label: ineffective tribal gathering
LanguageData.VFET_Inspiring.stages.0.description: We are close to a breakthrough, I can feel it!
LanguageData.VFET_Inspiring.stages.0.label: inspiring tribal gathering
LanguageData.VFET_Uninspiring.stages.0.description: There were some new ideas floating around, but not much of substance. At least it was kinda entertaining.
LanguageData.VFET_Uninspiring.stages.0.label: uninspiring tribal gathering
